__comment: Copy to agent-config.json (in the plugin data directory) and fill in. Provider credentials for the agent orchestrator. Never commit a filled copy.

anthropic.__comment: Anthropic API key. REQUIRED for Anthropic models. Leave empty string to disable.

openai.__comment: OpenAI API key. REQUIRED for OpenAI models. Leave empty string to disable.

google.__comment: Google Generative AI key for Gemini models. Leave empty string to disable.

openai-compat.__comment: OpenAI-compatible endpoint (LM Studio, Ollama, vLLM, LiteLLM, etc.). Fill in base URL + key, leave empty to disable.

defaultProvider: __REQUIRED__ — set to one of the keys above once its credentials are filled in.
